falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5500 (resistance level from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key level would invalidate the HOLD signal by confirming a bullish trend reversal, contradicting the current UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 50 (current value: 39) for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 indicates extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting a potential market top rather than continuation of the current pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the VIX crosses below 15 (current value: 22)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A VIX moving average below 15 would indicate a significant decrease in market volatility, refuting the current HOLD signal's implied uncertainty and suggesting a new bullish phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
